why-invalid: a scope=model-serving SLO whose objective carries provenance.basis
"assumed". The schema's conditional rule (slo.schema.json, top-level if/then) requires
every objective of a model-serving SLO to have provenance.basis "measured" — model-level
TTFT/ITL/goodput targets are declared ONLY from measurement, never in advance. Declaring
them by feel is exactly the fabricated default the fleet schemas forbid.
